title: festuca duriuscula var. villosa
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. villosa, also known as the hairy hard fescue, is a type of grass or herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from stress and anxiety. Festuca duriuscula var. villosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
